title: Create Mixed Copper Tools
description: An addon for Create Crafts Renewed mod Mixed Copper
body:
# This mod is an addon for Create Crafts Renewed
This mod adds tools for Create Crafts Renewed mod Mixed Coppers  
**This mod will probably make the game a bit easier, If you don't want that, Don't use this mod**
> This mod will add armor and tools for mixed copper such as Sword, Pickaxe, Axe, and more...\
> The tools are better than Stone tools but not better than Iron tools\
> The tools can mine anything that a Stone tool can\
> The mining speed of tools is like Gold tools (because mixed copper is made with gold and copper) but has more durability\
> The armor is better than gold armor but worse than iron armor
## Dependencies
- This mod requires [Create Crafts Renewed](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-crafts-renewed) to work
- Create Crafts Renewed mod requires [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) to work
- Using [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) is highly recommended for recipes
##
You're free to use this mod in a mod pack
> **This mod is under development**, if you have any suggestions, don't hesitate to tell me (`parham125` on discord)
